ROOM.LANDSCAPE_WARNING: Please rotate your device to portrait for a better experience

TOOLBAR.NO_TRACKS_PUBLISHED: Share audio or video to start recording.

CHAT.TITLE: Chat
CHAT.SUBTITLE: Messages will be removed at the end of the meeting
CHAT.WRITE_DISABLED: You don't have permission to send messages
CHAT.ENCRYPTION_KEY_MISMATCH: There are participants connected with a different encryption key. You will not receive messages from them.

BACKGROUND.TITLE: Background effects
BACKGROUND.NOT_SUPPORTED: Virtual backgrounds are not supported in this browser
BACKGROUND.NOT_SUPPORTED_DESCRIPTION: Your browser does not support background effects. This feature requires GPU acceleration which may be disabled or unavailable.

RECORDING.TITLE: Recording
RECORDING.SUBTITLE: Record your meeting for posterity
RECORDING.CONTENT_SUBTITLE: When recording has finished you will be able to download it with ease
RECORDING.DELETE_QUESTION: Are you sure you want to delete the recording?
RECORDING.NO_TRACKS_PUBLISHED: Share audio or video to start recording.

ERRORS.SESSION: There was an error connecting to the room
ERRORS.RECONNECT: Oops! Trying to reconnect to the room...
ERRORS.SIGNAL_CLOSE: The connection to the server was unexpectedly closed
ERRORS.SERVER_SHUTDOWN: The server is currently down or under maintenance
ERRORS.PARTICIPANT_REMOVED: You have been removed from this room
ERRORS.DUPLICATE_IDENTITY: You have been disconnected because your alias was assigned to another participant
ERRORS.TOGGLE_CAMERA: There was an error toggling camera
ERRORS.TOGGLE_MICROPHONE: There was an error toggling microphone
ERRORS.MEDIA_ERR_GENERIC: An error occurred while loading the video.
ERRORS.MEDIA_ERR_NETWORK: A network error caused the video download to fail part-way.
ERRORS.MEDIA_ERR_DECODE: The video playback was aborted due to a corruption problem or because the video used features your browser did not support.
ERRORS.MEDIA_ERR_SRC_NOT_SUPPORTED: Error streaming recording: S3 could not be reached.
ERRORS.E2EE_ERROR_CONTENT: This participant is using a different encryption key. Video cannot be displayed.
ERRORS.GENERIC: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

LOBBY.E2EE_BADGE_TEXT: Meetings in this room are end-to-end encrypted
LOBBY.JOIN_SUBTITLE: Join the meeting and start connecting
LOBBY.ROOM_CLOSED_SUBTITLE: This room is not available for meetings
LOBBY.ACCESS_RESTRICTED_SUBTITLE: You do not have permission to join meetings in this room
LOBBY.E2EE_KEY_HINT: This meeting requires an encryption key
LOBBY.ROOM_CLOSED_MESSAGE: Sorry, this room is closed. You cannot join the meeting at this time. Please contact a room manager for more information.
LOBBY.NO_PERMISSION_MESSAGE: Sorry, you have access to this room but do not have permission to join meetings. Please contact a room manager for more information.
LOBBY.RECORDINGS_DESCRIPTION: Access previously recorded meetings from this room. You can watch, download, or manage existing recordings.

SHARE_ACCESS.DEFAULT_TITLE: Invite others with this room access link

SHARE_OVERLAY.TITLE: Start collaborating
SHARE_OVERLAY.SUBTITLE: Share this link to bring others into the meeting

WAITING_PANEL.TITLE: Waiting for others to join
WAITING_PANEL.SUBTITLE: Participants will appear here as soon as they join the meeting.
WAITING_PANEL.ALONE_SUBTITLE: You're the only one here right now.

CAPTIONS.DISABLED_BY_ADMIN_TOOLTIP: Live captions are disabled by admin

LAYOUT_SETTINGS.TITLE: Layout settings
LAYOUT_SETTINGS.MOSAIC_DESC: Shows all participants in a unified grid
LAYOUT_SETTINGS.SMART_MOSAIC_DESC: Shows a limited number of active participants
LAYOUT_SETTINGS.COUNT_HELPER: Choose how many remote participants are shown in the grid

END_MEETING.LEFT_MESSAGE: You have successfully left the meeting
END_MEETING.KICKED_MESSAGE: You were kicked from the meeting by a moderator
END_MEETING.ENDED_MESSAGE: The meeting was ended by a moderator
END_MEETING.ENDED_BY_SELF_MESSAGE: You have successfully ended the meeting
END_MEETING.NETWORK_MESSAGE: Connection lost due to network connectivity issues
END_MEETING.SERVER_SHUTDOWN_MESSAGE: Connection lost due to server shutdown
END_MEETING.DUPLICATE_MESSAGE: This session was closed because you joined the same meeting from another tab or device
END_MEETING.UNKNOWN_MESSAGE: Some unexpected error occurred, please try again later
END_MEETING.FOOTER: Thank you for using OpenVidu Meet

MEETING_PAGE.INIT_ERROR_MESSAGE: An error occurred while initializing the meeting lobby. Please try again later.

MIC_ALERT.SYSTEM_MUTED_DESC: Go to your computer's settings to unmute the microphone and turn up the volume
MIC_ALERT.MUTED_SPEAKING: Are you talking? Your microphone is off. Click it to turn it on.
